Sc. Biotechnology of Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, HP, got commissioned in Artillery. Natasha joyfully informed this to Head of the department and her guide Prof. Sudhir Syal. Prof. Syal told us that even during her masters degree, she involved herself to solve the problem of waste management disposal at high altitudes especially for Indian forces. The Vice Chancellor Prof. R.K. Sharma congratulated her on this achievement. Natasha was selected in the training with All India Rank 1. all the family members of Natasha re are very happy with her achievement. JUIT family also extend the best wishes to Natasha for her progressive and successful career ahead. View External About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
